title: Mavericks vs. Rockets: O/U 223.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 31 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Mavericks and Rockets combine to score 224 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 224, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
